properties.titulo_evento: Rubio ratchets up pressure on NATO at key summit
properties.descricao: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is casting new doubt on NATO's relevance after key allies recoiled from backing Washington’s “Operation Epic Fury.”

properties.titulo_evento: Iran hints US will end war in ‘Persian-style’ peace on Tehran’s terms
properties.descricao: Iran’s foreign ministry spokesman invoked ancient Persia’s victory over Rome in comparison to today’s US-Iran talks.

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli attack on Gaza kills three family members, including infant
properties.descricao: Mohammad Abu Mallouh, ​Alaa Zaqlan and their child, Osama, killed in the attack on Nuseirat refugee camp, medics say.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war day 86: Trump announces potential deal amid ‘cloud of mistrust’
properties.descricao: Trump announces progress on Iran peace deal, signalling the Strait of Hormuz, vital for global trade, could reopen soon.

properties.titulo_evento: Marco Rubio says ‘significant progress’ made in US-Iran talks to end war
properties.descricao: Iranian news agency says deal could see shipping levels through Strait of Hormuz return to pre-war levels within weeks.

properties.titulo_evento: US, Iran inch closer to deal to end the war: What to know
properties.descricao: The proposed US-Iran peace deal seeks to reopen the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz amid lingering disagreements.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia pounds Ukraine’s capital with hypersonic missile
properties.descricao: Russia pounded Ukraine’s capital overnight on Saturday with drones and ballistic missiles.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says US and Iran deal to end war is ‘largely negotiated’
properties.descricao: US President Trump announced that a Memorandum of Understanding on a peace deal with Iran has been ‘largely negotiated'.

properties.titulo_evento: Yemen war sees scramble for scant resources between displaced and locals
properties.descricao: Reduced aid to Yemen and a domestic economic crisis see extreme suffering among the displaced at the Maryamah camp.

properties.titulo_evento: Toxic gases hinder rescue efforts inside deadly China mine
properties.descricao: Toxic gases are making it hard for rescue teams in China to reach deeper sections of a coal mine which exploded.

properties.titulo_evento: Russian attacks on Ukraine’s Kyiv kill at least four people
properties.descricao: Two ​people are killed in ⁠the ​capital itself and two ⁠in the Kyiv region while 40 locations are damaged.

properties.titulo_evento: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
properties.descricao: The Oreshnik missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.

properties.titulo_evento: Rubio meets Modi during India visit with energy high on agenda
properties.descricao: The secretary of state wants to sell US energy to Delhi to make up for shortfalls caused by the Iran war.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says Iran deal 'largely negotiated' including reopening Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Tehran also signals progress on talks but says the key issue of nuclear weapons is not part of an initial framework it is working on.

properties.titulo_evento: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
properties.descricao: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.

properties.titulo_evento: I survived a missile strike in the Strait of Hormuz, but my friend has not been found
properties.descricao: Sunil Puniya was on his first sea job when a missile struck the oil tanker Skylight at the start of the Iran war.

properties.titulo_evento: Rosenberg: Luhansk strike sparks Russian accusations and vow to retaliate
properties.descricao: Eighteen people were killed and 42 others injured in the strike on the town in Russian-occupied eastern Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: US and Iran 'getting a lot closer' to an agreement to end war, Trump says
properties.descricao: The US and Iran are close to signing a Pakistan-drafted framework agreement to end the war, with a decision expected within 48 hours, according to officials who spoke in anonymity. The proposal sets a 30-to-60-day window to negotiate details, though ...

properties.titulo_evento: Xi Jinping urges 'all-out rescue' after coal mine explosion kills at least 82 in China
properties.descricao: Six emergency rescue teams consisting of 345 personnel have since been sent to the scene, the Xinhua state news agency reported on Saturday.

properties.titulo_evento: Pakistan's army chief arrives in Tehran as Rubio signals 'slight progress' in peace talks
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump has described the stop-start negotiations this week as teetering on the "borderline" between a deal and renewed attacks.

properties.titulo_evento: US-Iran closing in on deal to end war: Trump says it could reopen Hormuz
properties.descricao: Jennifer Gavito, Former US State Department official, Senior Advisor, The Cohen Group, is our guest.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump administration eyes Cuba after Venezuela raid and turns up pressure
properties.descricao: Andrés Pertierra, PhD candidate in Latin American & Cuban history, University of Wisconsin-Madison, is our guest.

properties.titulo_evento: War in Ukraine: Russia launches massive missile strike on Kyiv
properties.descricao: Macron, EU’s Kallas condemn Russian attack on Ukraine with Oreshnik ballistic missile.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia uses hypersonic Oreshnik missile in Kyiv attack
properties.descricao: Russia carried out a massive drone and missile attack on the capital, Kyiv, and its surrounding region overnight, killing at least four people. France and Germany have condemned Moscow's use of the Oreshnik missile.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Most doubt Bundeswehr military readiness — poll
properties.descricao: A new poll shows widespread doubts about Germany's defense readiness, with stronger fears over cyber threats than military attack. Meanwhile, a record number of people obtained a German passport in 2025. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Donald Trump says deal 'largely negotiated'
properties.descricao: US Secretary of State Rubio has said an announcement on the deal could come as early as Sunday. Pakistan's top diplomat has cited "meaningful progress," while Israel's Netanyahu reportedly voiced concern. Follow DW.

properties.titulo_evento: Cheap attack drones break through Israel's Iron Dome
properties.descricao: Inexpensive fiber-optic drones are challenging Israel's high-tech defenses, shifting the military balance in the Middle East.

properties.titulo_evento: US, Iran strike upbeat tone as Hormuz deal takes shape
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump flagged progress in talks with Iran, Tehran has warned that major gaps still stand in the way of dialing down the conflict.

properties.titulo_evento: Zelenskyy rejects Merz proposal for associate EU membership
properties.descricao: "Ukraine’s place in the European Union must also be complete — full and equal," Ukrainian leader says.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia batters Kyiv with massive missile and drone attack
properties.descricao: Moscow used some 600 drones and 30 missiles, including at least one Oreshnik, a powerful hypersonic ballistic missile that is capable of carrying nuclear weapons, Ukraine's air force said.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says peace deal with Iran is imminent
properties.descricao: It remains unclear whether the agreement will involve formal limitations on Iran’s nuclear program.

properties.titulo_evento: France bans Israel’s Ben-Gvir from entry
properties.descricao: French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot also called for EU sanctions on the far-right Israeli minister, who has been widely criticized for taunting activists aboard the Global Sumud flotilla.

properties.titulo_evento: Stocks Gain for 8th Week Amid Impasse Over Reopening Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Nearly three months since the fighting began, disagreements remain over the fate of Iran’s uranium stockpile and transit fees for the Strait of Hormuz.
